```
h1 JetBrains Plugin Setup Guide
h2 Requirements

h2 First-Time Setup

h3 1. Health Status Bar Widget
h3 2. Regenerate Context Action
h3 3. Open Context File Action
h3 4. View Roadmap Action
h2 Configuration
h2 Troubleshooting
h3 Plugin Not Visible in Tools Menu
h3 "gen-context.js not found" Error
h1 Creates node_modules/.bin/sigmap (and gen-context compatibility entry)
h1 macOS/Linux: move binary to ~/.local/bin/sigmap and ensure PATH includes ~/.local/bin
h1 Windows: move sigmap.exe to %USERPROFILE%\\bin and add it to PATH
h3 Status Bar Shows "⚠ missing"
h3 Keyboard Shortcut Doesn't Work
h3 Context File Not Opening
h1 OR
```

```
h2 Different tools, different jobs
h3 sigmap — Always-on signatures
h3 repomix — Deep session context
h3 Together they cover every workflow
h2 The two-layer caching strategy
h3 Combined workflow
h1 Session start — run once
h1 [repomix] packed 247 files → 28,400 tokens (compressed)
h1 Always running — background watcher
h1 [sigmap] watching src/ app/ lib/ ...
h1 Query with both layers
h1 Result: 28,400 tokens cached (L1) + 3,847 tokens fresh (L2)
h1 L1 cache hit rate: 97% ← pay once per session
h1 L2 tokens: 3,847 ← always current
h1 Effective cost: -76% vs uncached full context
```

### docs-vp/guide/troubleshooting.md
```
h1 Troubleshooting
h2 Issue 1 — "no context file found"
h1 v22.11.0 ← v18+ required
h1 [sigmap] ✓ wrote .github/copilot-instructions.md
h1 .github/copilot-instructions.md ← file now exists
h2 Issue 2 — Copilot or Claude still asks "can you share some files?"
h1 .github/copilot-instructions.md ← must exist here
h2 Issue 3 — Token reduction is lower than expected (< 80%)
h1 test files
h1 build output
h2 Issue 4 — Context file is stale — VS Code shows grade D or "3d ago"
h1 [sigmap] ✓ installed .git/hooks/post-commit
h1 [sigmap] context will regenerate on every git commit
h2 Issue 5 — Over-budget warning: some files were dropped
h2 Issue 6 — MCP server not appearing in tool list
h1 sigmap v2.8.0 ← must print a version
h1 {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"tools":[...]}} ← 8 tools
h2 Issue 7 — "gen-context.js not found" in VS Code
h2 Issue 8 — Secret scan is redacting a false positive
h2 Issue 9 — Monorepo: context only covers one package
h2 Issue 10 — Watch mode stops working after sleep or wake
h1 [sigmap] watching for changes...
h2 Still stuck? Get more help
h2 Next steps
code-fence bash
```
